event_description: Triggered when a user activates a planet, enabling it to generate resources and contribute to their network.

properties.property_description: The number of currently activated planets for the user.
The user's unique Freedom ID (Freedom Wallet ID).
Unique identifier of the planet.
Display name of the planet.
The total number of planets owned by the user.

event_description: Recorded when a user deactivates a planet, halting its resource production and network contribution.

properties.property_description: The number of currently activated planets for the user.
The user's unique Freedom ID (Freedom Wallet ID).
Unique identifier of the planet.
Display name of the planet.
The total number of planets owned by the user.

event_description: Triggered when a user successfully claims accumulated rewards from their planet.

properties.property_description: The numerical amount of rewards claimed by the user.
The type or name of the reward that was claimed.
The user's unique Freedom ID (Freedom Wallet ID).

event_description: Recorded when a user constructs a new structure on one of their planets.

properties.property_description: The user's unique Freedom ID (Freedom Wallet ID).
Unique identifier of the planet.
Display name of the planet.
Unique identifier for the built structure.
Display name of the built structure.
The category or type of the structure (e.g., Food, Industrial).
Total number of food-type structures on the planet.
Total number of industrial-type structures on the planet.
Total number of all structures on the planet.

event_description: Triggered when a user reallocates or adjusts workforce assignments across their planet's sectors.

properties.property_description: The remaining workforce units available for assignment on the planet.
The user's unique Freedom ID (Freedom Wallet ID).
The number of workforce units assigned to food production.
The number of workforce units assigned to industrial tasks.
Unique identifier of the planet.
Display name of the planet.
